utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget (6 total). Checking the final package: 
1. destination: provided (Split, Croatia) – fully specified ✓ 
2. travel_dates: provided (2024-07-25 to 2024-07-30) – fully specified ✓ 
3. transportation: includes airline, airports, class, and total_flight_cost – fully specified ✓ 
4. accommodation: includes property details, type, rating, location, cost, and amenities – fully specified ✓ 
5. activities: includes list, total cost, currency, difficulty, guide – fully specified ✓ 
6. additional_services: includes travel insurance and payment method, both specified with details and provider – fully specified ✓ 
7. total_budget: includes total cost, currency, budget limit, remaining – fully specified ✓ 
All items in the format appear and are fully detailed.
